updates.title: Data engine, memory-bounded tables, and chart viewport

sections.title: Data engine & worker
items: Engine worker exposes a `Data` RPC: paged `getPage`, range, aggregated time-series, preview, and manifest helpers, backed by IndexedDB.
Typed RPC contracts (`data-contract`) and a shared `MiniGrpc` client via `getEngineRpc()` / `engineSingleton`.
Aggregations in the worker: LTTB downsampling and time-bucket methods for large series.
Expanded `docs/DATA_FLOW.md` and a design note for the memory-bounded `DataSource` (sliding-window retention for tables).

sections.title: Tables & memory
items: New `DataSource` class + `useDataSource` for virtualized tables: bounded in-memory page cache with eviction, replacing unbounded `useDatasetPage` accumulation.
`DataTable` / `SimpleTable` supports a `dataSource` mode (virtual rows + `total`) next to the existing dense `data` mode; paged mode disables client sort/filter to avoid misleading results.
Fix: long scroll no longer leaves the table stuck on a single “Loading…” column—column schema is inferred once and cached so page 0 is not re-pinned in the eviction loop.

sections.title: Charts & UI
items: `useDatasetSlice` ties chart data to the worker with viewport-aware, aggregated series loading.
Cartesian charts: pan/zoom viewport interaction hook, more robust paint and SVG mount, optional bar series renderer, extra axis margin for preview context.
Visuals page: `ChartCard` previews and a richer sample/showcase experience.

sections.title: Tests & quality
items: Broadened Vitest coverage: utils, dates, CSV, format, object-path, localStorage mock, engine aggregations, dataset storage, `DataSource` unit tests, and more.

updates.title: D3 engine: modular renderers, CartesianChart & registry

sections.title: Renderer & core
items: Split line, area, and scatter into dedicated modules (`line.ts`, `area.ts`, `scatter.ts`) with shared `shared.ts` coordinate helpers.
Move D3 curve factories to `core/curves.ts`; state and enums no longer own `curveMap`.
Rename BaseChart to CartesianChart; extract `useCartesianSvgMount` and `useCartesianChartPaint` for SVG lifecycle vs paint pipeline.
Top-level `d3-core` barrel exports core utilities only; chart code is imported by path to keep chunks explicit.
Add `charts/registry.ts` scaffold for future lazy-loaded families (donut, radial, …).
Tooltip: remove `@ts-nocheck`, normalize `x` as Date for time scales; strip debug `console.log` from d3-core entrypoints.
ChartType.BAR appears in settings as “coming soon”; axes render without series until bar renderer exists.

updates.title: Data layer, compute facade & developer tooling

sections.title: Data & compute
items: Stabilize data-engine usage for datasets and RPC-backed reads.
Compute facade (`compute/`) for WASM-backed series generation and related helpers.
Built-in sample dataset with configurable point count and default sample IDs; Home uses the same pipeline for uploads vs sample data.

sections.title: Docs & agent tooling
items: Cursor rules: project context, React/TS, Jotai, D3-core, performance guardrails.
Agent onboarding (`AGENTS.md`); repo-local skills (frontend UI, React patterns, performance, system design).
Enhance agent skills and editor configuration for dashboard work.

sections.title: New features
items: Add ButtonGroup component for enhanced button layouts.
Implement Dataset container for dataset management and display.
Create Datasources container for handling data source uploads.
Develop DatasourceList component for displaying datasets with previews.
Introduce JsonUpload component for JSON data uploads with validation.
Implement FileUpload component for CSV and JSON file uploads.
Add ChangelogPage to display application updates and changes.
Create UpdateCard component for rendering individual update entries.
Implement OPFS utility functions for file system access.

sections.title: Fixes
items: Add type definitions for global file system interfaces.

sections.title: Chores & refactors
items: Refactor and organize code for improved readability and maintainability.

sections.title: Improvements
items: Add d3-time-format and types for robust date formatting in charts.
Introduce ScrollArea and integrate into dataset list.
JSON upload UX: textarea input with validation and error states.

sections.title: Bug fixes
items: Remove unused imports (e.g. ScrollArea in DatasetsPage).

sections.title: Improvements
items: Add lodash-es utilities; introduce persisted Jotai atoms for datasets.
Implement dataset upload (JSON/CSV) with validation pipeline.
Add Activity and Visuals views; switch Home to ViewRenderer.

sections.title: Changes
items: Force dark theme; tidy imports and comments across components.

sections.title: Changes
items: Replace SVG tooltip with HTML tooltip; auto arrow direction.
Refine tooltip positioning; remove unused Arrow import.

sections.title: Chore
items: Add favicon and update index.html metadata.

sections.title: Improvements
items: Grid type and data-point visibility toggles in chart settings.
Base chart component: SVG tooltip support hook; settings propagation cleanup.

sections.title: Improvements
items: Add react-colorful and ColorSelector; gradient fill support for area charts.
Streamline renderAxes and series rendering; improve grid generation (idempotent).

sections.title: Bug fixes
items: Type fixes for lastRef; tooltip data handling improvements.

sections.title: Improvements
items: Add TypeScript declarations for wasm_math_bg.wasm (memory and bindings).

sections.title: Improvements
items: Project bootstrap: Vite, React, Tailwind, TypeScript.
Add dataWorker.ts for WASM-backed time-series generation.
Create simple line chart demo and TS configs (app and node).
